profile_bio.description: Founder, CEO, Chief Analyst @MoorInsStrat. Co-founder of @TheSixFiveMedia and @Signal_65. Healthspan improver. Ex-AMD CVP, Compaq. Use AI to improve posts.

quoted_tweet.text:
I’m here in SF to attend the Tenstorrent event. My firm hasn’t researched the company extensively, so I’m here to learn. While previous TT events look like they’re more about architecture and the deep tech, this event name “Deploy” is the reason I’m here. I want to know more about who is deploying, why they’re deploying, to get a sense of what the company could be in the future. 

I’ve seen Groq get acquired, Cerebras going public, Sambanova cut a TBD deal with Intel, and interested where Tenstorrent could go. 

There’s an insatiable demand for compute, costs, power need and complexity are skyrocketing and there is room for more players. 

What questions do you have? What do you want to know?

profile_bio.description: Founder, CEO, Chief Analyst @MoorInsStrat. Co-founder of @TheSixFiveMedia and @Signal_65. Healthspan improver. Ex-AMD CVP, Compaq. Use AI to improve posts.
